name: Add and configure Conditions of Interest

steps.name: Wait for selector getByTestId(/^item-name/).filter({ hasText: '1772803991807 substantiate-e2e' }).first().or(getByTestId('empty-list-message'))
Fill "1772804366176 Conditions for Prevalence and Incidence Analysis" getByTestId('analysis-name-input')
Fill "1772804366176 Conditions for Prevalence and Incidence Analysis" getByTestId('report-background-text-input')
Click getByTestId('modal-dialog').locator('div').locator('span[data-test-element^="item-name-"]').getByText('1772804000828 Any medical claim', { exact: true }).first()
Expect "toBeVisible" getByTestId('header-content').filter({ hasText: '1772804000828 Any medical claim' })

labels.name: epic
labels.value: Prevalence & Incidence Analysis Plan 21 CFR Part 11
